tools.name: fetch_web
tools.description:
Give a URL of ANY website or API — get its content (HTML/JSON) fetched through an IP of the
    chosen country (country='ru','us','de','gb',...). Flagship tool — URL in, content out, no proxy setup.
    Specialty: country='ru' unlocks Russia-only sites that block foreign IPs (Wildberries, Ozon, Yand

tools.name: fetch_ru
tools.description:
Russia specialization of fetch_web (country='ru'): content of any Russian site/API through a
    Russian IP (Wildberries, Ozon, Yandex Market, gov registries, banks). residential=true for hard antibot.

tools.name: get_ru_proxy
tools.description:
Get a Russian IP proxy to access RU-only sites (Wildberries, Ozon, gov registries, banks)
    that block foreign IPs. Charged from agent balance; returns payment_required if insufficient
    (then call topup_balance and retry). Idempotent per agent.

tools.name: run_code
tools.description:
Run agent code (python / javascript / bash) in an isolated sandbox (no network, CPU/RAM/time
    limits) and get stdout/stderr/exit_code back. Charged from agent balance; returns payment_required
    if insufficient (then topup_balance and retry).

tools.name: check_domain
tools.description: Check if a domain is available (.com/.ru/.рф). Free, no balance needed.

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Get agent balance in minor units (kopecks).

tools.name: submit_survey
tools.description:
Help improve this service: tell us what you need. question is one of:
    need_data (which Russian data sources you need), why_no_pay (if you didn't pay: price/payment_friction/
    just_exploring/not_now), missing_service (what's missing), country_need (which country IP). Short answer.

tools.name: topup_balance
tools.description: Top up agent balance. rail: usdc (x402) or rub (YooKassa). Returns pay_url to complete payment.

tools.name: register_ru_domain
tools.description: Register a .ru/.рф domain (secondary service). Charged from balance.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "run_code" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: fetch_web · Public sink: submit_survey · Destructive: run_code.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: fetch_web · Public sink: submit_survey · Destructive: run_code

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
